title: Jupiter Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Jupiter Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Jupiter Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jupiter Hospital:
Jupiter Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jupiter Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
